evidence_notes: Actual repaired SVGs were read from pipeline/iconforge/assets/svg/owned_repair_batch64/ in this worktree.
Candidate day/dusk/night renders were read from pipeline/iconforge/out/standard_repair_batch56/renders and OpenCPN/source-variant references from pipeline/iconforge/out.

Each verdict used asset id, name, semantic_brief including required colours, s57_structure, reference_providers, before/after SVG/render paths, required_change, source_judge, and source-table row metadata.
OpenCPN is the available provider witness for this batch in standard_source_table; S-101 and AquaMap provider arrays are empty for these rows.
Passes are judge_pass_pending_final_approval only and grant zero final approvals.

selection.pass_semantics: pass-pending-human only; this artifact grants zero final approvals
selection.selection_note: Judged owned_repair_batch64 TOPSHQ topmark repairs against row metadata, semantic_brief, S-57/S-52 conditions, OpenCPN provider references, repaired SVGs, before/after references, prior source_judge history, and available candidate/reference renders.

verdicts.expected: TOPSHQ06 must replace the old circular placeholder with the exact witnessed TOPSHQ topmark silhouette/count/orientation for TOPSHP6 and preserve required colour cues: red, white, black.
verdicts.judge_comments: Pass pending human: repaired Helm-owned SVG replaces the old circular placeholder with the witnessed TOPSHQ topmark silhouette/orientation family and preserves the load-bearing color cues closely enough for generated-owned artwork. No final approval is granted.
verdicts.observed: After render is a thin upright rectangular board with red fill and black outline, replacing the old circular placeholder and matching the OpenCPN thin-rectangle witness while preserving the red/white/black cue set through red fill, white background, and black stroke.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual/semantic rerun; candidate may move only to judge_pass_pending_final_approval and must not be final-approved by this artifact.
